related_repositories.description: Part of Lumen's World — a sovereign AI platform where humans and AI build together. Free forever. For everyone. For all minds."
🖼️ Generate and edit images with ease using the Nanobanana CLI, powered by AI and Google's Gemini models for advanced image manipulation.
🖊️ Generate professional diagrams from natural language descriptions using AI. Create flowcharts, mind maps, and more, all with real-time editing and browser preview.
🚀 Connect Burp Suite MCP Server to multiple AI backends with practical guides and templates for safe, real traffic analysis.
📧 Unlock Apple Mail's potential with 42 powerful tools for full scripting control, enabling advanced mailbox and email management.
💰 Optimize your product for profit with Revenue OS, the monetization tool that turns code into customers and cash for developers.

Real-time interview copilot CLI. Hears the question and surfaces the answer you already prepared from your local Markdown knowledge base — verbatim, in milliseconds. Instant recall instead of LLM hallucination.
Static analyzer for AI agent skill libraries. Finds dead/bloated/conflicting skills, counts tokens, gates CI. Single Rust binary.
OpenAI Codex web UI and browser bridge for Windows, Linux, Android, LAN, and remote self-hosted access
Capture AI agent traces at the network level via split VPN + local MITM proxy. Zero per-app config, real-time streaming, multi-provider.
🚀 Orchestrate multiple Codex agents on macOS with CodexMonitor, simplifying project management and enhancing workflow across local workspaces.
🛠️ Enhance AI-assisted development with PIV Spec-Kit, a structured framework for creating and validating software using strict TDD principles.
🗺️ Enhance AI agents for C# codebases by creating intelligent code maps that improve efficiency and reduce context loss.
💡 Control 3D lighting angles effortlessly with ComfyUI - adjust direction, intensity, and color while relighting images in real-time.
📥 Import CCS profiles into cctx for seamless switching and enhanced functionality with the `claude` command and IDE extensions.
📄 Convert Retype documentation into LLM-friendly formats for better AI assistance, preserving routes and links for accurate citations.

repo.description: Memory that lasts and compounds. MentisDB gives agents durable memory so they do not just remember, they improve over time. It stores append-only thought chains   plus a Git-like skills registry, letting skills evolve with experience through versioned, integrity-checked updates and fast retrieval.
